description: Memorial 'Wall of Honor' card from ICE. The background is a blurred color photograph of two deep-red roses lying on a dark slate surface with an out-of-focus American flag draped behind at upper right. Inset at the upper left, on a black field, is a gold-and-blue badge reading 'U.S. CUSTOMS - THE DEPARTMENT OF THE TREASURY' at top and 'SPECIAL AGENT' on the bottom banner, with a central Treasury seal dated 1789. Across the bottom, white serif typography reads 'Wall of Honor' (large) beside an ICE blue-ribbon pin, with the text: 'Special Agent John M. Lacey', a gold-ruled divider, 'End of Watch', and the date 'Saturday, May 21, 1977'. The tweet text states Special Agent John M. Lacey died in 1977 from a New Jersey auto-accident injury.
notable_text: Wall of Honor; Special Agent John M. Lacey; End of Watch; Saturday, May 21, 1977; U.S. CUSTOMS - DEPARTMENT OF THE TREASURY - SPECIAL AGENT
